english.backupReminderMessage: You have {count} notes stored locally in your browser. Export a backup before clearing browser data or switching devices.
english.deleteAllUndoMessage: All notes moved to Recently Deleted.
english.importPreviewText: Adds {addCount} notes, skips {skipCount} duplicates. Merge keeps existing notes; Replace overwrites the current list.
english.settingsSubtitle: Local-first controls for privacy, backups, and the writing feel.
english.settingsBackupRecoveryTagline: Keep notes portable and recover from mistakes.
english.settingsLanguageTagline: Change the interface or add your own language pack.
english.settingsExperienceTagline: Quiet optional details that stay out of your writing.
english.settingsCelebrationsTagline: Small visual rewards after milestones. Off by default.
english.settingsSoundEffectsTagline: Soft interface sounds for feedback. Off by default.
english.settingsInstallThoughtsTagline: Launch faster from your home screen and keep offline access close.
english.settingsUpdateAvailableTagline: Version {version} is ready. Install now and reload when you choose.
english.settingsOfflineUpdate: Connect to the internet and try again.
english.settingsAboutTagline: Privacy, offline details, release build, and creator links.
english.pageZoomOn: Browser zoom is available when you need larger text.
english.pageZoomOff: Kept locked for an app-like layout on this device.
english.name: English
english.deleteAllConfirmText: This can’t be undone and all your notes will be removed.
english.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Deleting... air? Impressive. Maybe try writing something before going full cleanup mode?
english.deletePostConfirmText: This can’t be undone and it will be removed from your timeline.
english.noPostsMessage: No notes available. Start by adding a new note above.
english.noResultsMessage: No matching notes found. Try refining your search or adding a new note.
english.exportEmptyMessage: Exporting... nothing? A bold move. Maybe try filling the page before sending emptiness into the void?
english.importErrorInvalidFile: Nice try, but we only accept JSON files. What’s this, a rebellious PDF?
english.importErrorNotThoughts: This JSON isn’t from Thoughts App. Did you just whip this up in Notepad to mess with me?
english.importErrorInvalidFormat: Invalid format. This JSON is as useful as a screen door on a submarine.
english.importErrorInvalidJSON: That’s not even valid JSON. What did you do, feed it through a blender?
english.importConfirmText: You’ve got existing notes. Merge them with the new ones or replace everything?
english.importSuccessMerge: Notes merged successfully. Look at you, playing nice with your old ideas!
english.importSuccessReplace: Notes replaced. Old stuff’s gone—hope you didn’t like it too much!
english.importSuccessFirst: Notes imported successfully. You’re finally contributing something!
english.footerAndroidGuide: Android: Menu (⋮) > Add to Home screen.
english.footerIOSGuide: iOS: Share (⬆) > Add to Home Screen.
english.footerPrivacy: Thoughts is secure & private. No data collected—your notes stay local.
english.discardConfirmText: You have unsaved changes. Discard them to edit this post?
english.deleteLanguageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
english.charLimitMessage: Whoa there! Only {count} characters are allowed. Extra characters? Poof—they’re gone!
english.webStoreNote: Download your favorite language from the site and upload it to the app using the Upload Language option.
english.invalidFileMessage: Please upload a valid JSON file.
english.notThoughtsLanguage: This is not a Thoughts app language file. Only official Thoughts language packs are allowed.
english.invalidJSONMessage: Could not parse the JSON file. Please ensure it’s valid.
english.refreshMessage: The app will refresh to apply changes.
english.emptyPostMessage: You haven’t written anything yet! Add some text before posting.
english.updateMessage: The app will refresh to apply the new version. Unsaved changes will be preserved.
english.updateFailedMessage: Could not complete update. Please try again.
english.footerDescription: Efficiently crafted: Entire app under 1MB, including all assets.
english.volumeNotificationMessage: For the best experience with sound effects, please turn your device volume to maximum.
english.emptyNoteMessage: Write a thought first, then tap Add.
english.updateInstallingMessage: Preparing version {version}. Your current draft is kept safe.
english.updateReadyMessage: Version {version} is installed. Reload to finish switching over.
english.aboutSubtitle: A fast local notebook for private thoughts, tasks, memories, and ideas.
english.aboutPrivateStorageText: Notes are stored locally in your browser on this device.
english.aboutPrivacyText: Clearing browser data can delete your notes. Export a backup regularly before resetting the browser, changing devices, or clearing storage.
english.updateFailedTrySettings: Update failed. Try again from Settings.
english.storageFullMessage: Cannot save note: storage limit reached. Delete some notes to free space.
english.savePostFailed: Failed to save note. Try again.
english.pinLimitMessage: One note is already pinned. Unpin it first.
english.godModeTapsRemaining: {count} more taps to unlock God Mode
english.celebrationsOffMessage: Celebrations are off. Enable them in Settings.
english.installPromptMessage: Thoughts can be installed for offline use
english.recentlyDeletedEmpty: No deleted notes. Items stay here for {days} days.

hinglish.backupReminderMessage: Aapke {count} notes browser mein local stored hain. Browser data clear ya device change karne se pehle backup export kar lo.
hinglish.undoDeleteMessage: Note Recently Deleted mein chala gaya.
hinglish.deleteAllUndoMessage: Saare notes Recently Deleted mein chale gaye.
hinglish.importPreviewText: {addCount} notes add honge, {skipCount} duplicates skip honge. Merge existing notes rakhega; Replace current list overwrite karega.
hinglish.settingsSubtitle: Privacy, backups, aur writing feel ke local-first controls.
hinglish.settingsBackupRecoveryTagline: Notes portable rakho aur mistakes recover karo.
hinglish.settingsLanguageTagline: Interface badlo ya apna language pack add karo.
hinglish.settingsExperienceTagline: Quiet optional details jo writing se dhyaan nahi hatate.
hinglish.settingsCelebrationsTagline: Milestones ke baad small visual rewards. Default off.
hinglish.settingsSoundEffectsTagline: Soft interface sounds feedback ke liye. Default off.
hinglish.settingsInstallThoughtsTagline: Home screen se fast launch aur offline access paas rakho.
hinglish.settingsUpdateAvailableTagline: Version {version} ready hai. Ab install karo, reload jab chaho.
hinglish.settingsOfflineUpdate: Internet connect karke phir try karo.
hinglish.settingsAboutTagline: Privacy, offline details, release build, aur creator links.
hinglish.pageZoomOn: Text bada chahiye ho toh browser zoom available hai.
hinglish.pageZoomOff: Is device par app-like layout ke liye locked hai.
hinglish.name: Hinglish
hinglish.deleteAllConfirmText: Ek baar gaya toh wapas nahi aayega! Soch lo, saare notes hawa ho jayenge.
hinglish.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Arre bhai, yeh jagah toh pehle se zyada khaali hai! Delete ka button daba ke AC chalane ka plan hai kya?
hinglish.deletePostConfirmText: Yeh wapas nahi hoga aur timeline se hat jayega.
hinglish.noPostsMessage: Koi notes nahi hai. Upar se ek naya note daalo.
hinglish.noResultsMessage: Kuch match nahi mila. Search thoda badlo ya naya note daalo.
hinglish.exportEmptyMessage: Export? Matlab hawa bhar ke file banaoge? Pehle kuch likho, warna bas ek khaali dabba milega!
hinglish.importErrorInvalidFile: Chalaki mat karo, sirf JSON file chahiye. Yeh kya PDF ya kachra hai?
hinglish.importErrorNotThoughts: Yeh JSON Vichaar App ka nahi hai. Notepad mein banaya kya, shaitaan?
hinglish.importErrorInvalidFormat: Format toh totally ulta-pulta hai! Yeh JSON hai ya kisi totay ka future prediction?
hinglish.importErrorInvalidJSON: Arre bhai, yeh JSON hai ya aloo ka paratha? Bilkul bekar format!
hinglish.importConfirmText: Purane notes hai. Naye wale mix karo ya sab replace kar do?
hinglish.importSuccessMerge: Notes mix ho gaye. Purane ideas ke saath nayi baatein, badhiya!
hinglish.importSuccessReplace: Notes replace ho gaye. Purana sab gaya—ummeed hai pasand nahi tha!
hinglish.importSuccessFirst: Notes import ho gaye. Ab toh kuch daal rahe ho, shabaash!
hinglish.footerOfflineText: Vichaar ko offline use ke liye install karo:
hinglish.footerAndroidGuide: Android: Menu (⋮) > Home screen pe daalo.
hinglish.footerIOSGuide: iOS: Share (⬆) > Home Screen pe daalo.
hinglish.footerPrivacy: Vichaar safe aur private hai. Koi data nahi liya—notes aapke paas hi rehte hai.
hinglish.discardConfirmText: Aapke paas unsaved changes hai. Inko chhodkar yeh post edit karna hai?
hinglish.footerMadeWithLove: भारत में ❤ ke saath banaya gaya
hinglish.deleteLanguageConfirm: Aapko Pakaa Yakin hai, aapko hatana hai
hinglish.charLimitMessage: Arre bhai! Sirf {count} characters allowed hai. Baaki? Ud gaye!
hinglish.webStoreNote: Apni pasandida bhasha site se download karo aur Upload Language option se app mein daalo.
hinglish.invalidFileMessage: Valid JSON file upload karo yaar.
hinglish.notThoughtsLanguage: Yeh Thoughts app ka language file nahi hai. Sirf official Thoughts language packs chahiye.
hinglish.invalidJSONMessage: JSON file parse nahi ho paya. Check karo ki sahi hai.
hinglish.welcomeMessage: Swagat hai! Bhasha "{name}" set ho gaya.
hinglish.refreshMessage: App changes apply karne ke liye refresh hoga.
hinglish.emptyPostMessage: Aapne abhi tak kuch nahi likha! Post karne se pehle kuch likho.
hinglish.updateMessage: App refresh hoke naya version apply karega. Unsaved changes safe rahenge.
hinglish.updateFailedMessage: Update complete nahi ho paya. Phir try karein.
hinglish.shareFallbackMessage: Post clipboard me copy ho gaya!
hinglish.shareErrorMessage: Post copy karne me fail ho gaya.
hinglish.footerDescription: Kya Aapko Pata hai? Poora app 1MB se kam me banaya hai.
hinglish.volumeNotificationMessage: Sound effects ke liye best experience ke liye, apne device ki volume full kar do.
hinglish.emptyNoteMessage: Pehle ek thought likho, phir Add dabao.
hinglish.updateInstallingMessage: Version {version} ready ho raha hai. Aapka current draft safe hai.
hinglish.updateReadyMessage: Version {version} installed hai. Switch complete karne ke liye reload karo.
hinglish.aboutSubtitle: Private thoughts, tasks, memories aur ideas ke liye fast local notebook.
hinglish.aboutHeroTitle: Abhi capture karo. Baad mein control rakho.
hinglish.aboutPrivateStorageText: Notes is device par browser mein locally stored hain.
hinglish.aboutPrivacyText: Browser data clear karne se notes delete ho sakte hain. Reset, device change, ya storage clear karne se pehle backup export karo.
hinglish.updateFailedTrySettings: Update fail ho gaya. Settings se phir try karo.
hinglish.storageFullMessage: Note save nahi ho paya: storage full hai. Thode notes delete karo.
hinglish.savePostFailed: Note save nahi ho paya. Phir try karo.
hinglish.pinLimitMessage: Ek note already pinned hai. Pehle usse unpin karo.
hinglish.godModeTapsRemaining: God Mode unlock karne ke liye {count} taps aur
hinglish.celebrationsOffMessage: Celebrations off hain. Settings mein enable karo.
hinglish.installPromptMessage: Thoughts offline use ke liye install ho sakta hai
hinglish.recentlyDeletedEmpty: Koi deleted notes nahi. Items {days} din yahan rahenge.
